title: Wynncraft Hud Font More Readable
description: Turn wynncraft font to more readable
body:
Hello! I'm Focal. I feel 2 and 6 of wynncraft original hud font too hard to read.
so I change it to more readable.
I recommanded to install [Serverpack Priority](https://modrinth.com/mod/serverpack-priority) Mod! # About this pack
## Compare | Before | After | | :--: | :--: | | ![Before Change](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e98e8fa2d8010eebe886b0df19322a3019aa66f9.png) | ![After Change](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52a68b58fbaa64ed4471b28d5c9bf46ad9699741.png) | --- **If you want to see me create more content, supporting my work gives me the energy to make more stuff.**

> [![Support me on Patreon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/150ad87ca2fc99b8e1ebb73e00d2ac1c9a6d0c83.png)](https://patreon.com/focalsalt) --- Any BUG or Suggest, welcome to my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/sErWHY8PXH) to report.
Hope you like it, enjoy :D
